code: import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import"./SettingsView.scss";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const SettingsView=_ref=>{let{onClose}=_ref;const[liveFeedEnabled,setLiveFeedEnabled]=useState(()=>{return localStorage.getItem("liveFeedEnabled")!=="false";});useEffect(()=>{localStorage.setItem("liveFeedEnabled",String(liveFeedEnabled));const event=new CustomEvent("settings_update",{detail:{liveFeedEnabled}});window.dispatchEvent(event);},[liveFeedEnabled]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"settings-view draggable-module",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"settings-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"\u2699\uFE0F Settings"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:onClose,children:"\u2716"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"settings-option",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("label",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"checkbox",checked:liveFeedEnabled,onChange:()=>setLiveFeedEnabled(!liveFeedEnabled)}),"Enable Live Feed"]})})]});};
